title: [MTR] 300X | Class 955 Shinkansen
description: Class 955 "300X" Shinkansen addon for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the 300X (Class 955) experimental train to the game.

By default, doors do not open at stations due to the nature of this train.

All six cars are provided.

**[Check out my other Shinkansen packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

Enjoy!
